skills.summary: Started with proper greeting but failed to build personal connection with customer
areas_to_improve: Misspelled company name as 'للتسوية' instead of 'للتسويق'
Didn't correct mistake when customer pointed it out
Failed to build personal connection with customer

skills.summary: Provided information but often didn't directly address customer questions
strengths: Eventually provided information about apartment sizes and prices
areas_to_improve: Often didn't directly answer customer questions
Asked irrelevant question about customer location without explaining why

skills.summary: Asked about location but missed other important customer requirements
areas_to_improve: Failed to inquire about family size or specific needs
Didn't explain why location information was relevant

skills.summary: Demonstrated strong knowledge of apartment specifications and delivery timeline
strengths: Provided accurate information about apartment sizes and prices
Explained delivery timeline and finishing status clearly
areas_to_improve: Could provide more details about amenities and features
Didn't explain benefits of the location

skills.summary: Maintained professional tone but failed to recognize customer's frustration
areas_to_improve: Failed to recognize customer's growing frustration
Didn't adjust approach when customer showed signs of impatience

skills.summary: Clear on apartment details but had issues with grammar and company explanation
strengths: Provided clear information about apartment specifications
Used simple language to explain delivery timeline
areas_to_improve: Grammar and spelling issues in several responses

checkpoints.name: Rapport Established
checkpoints.why_missed: Failed to correct company name misunderstanding and didn't establish personal connection
checkpoints.description: Building trust and connection with the customer
checkpoints.how_to_achieve: Introduce yourself clearly, ask the customer's name, and show interest in their situation. Correct any misunderstandings immediately.

checkpoints.name: Needs Identified
checkpoints.how_achieved: Customer expressed interest in apartment size, price, location, finishing status, and payment options

checkpoints.name: Value Demonstrated
checkpoints.why_missed: Provided factual information but didn't connect features to benefits for the customer
checkpoints.description: Showing how the property meets customer needs
checkpoints.how_to_achieve: After sharing property details, explain why these features would benefit this specific customer based on their needs.

checkpoints.name: Objection Handled
checkpoints.why_missed: No major objections were raised in this conversation
checkpoints.how_to_achieve: When objections arise, acknowledge them, provide information to address concerns, and confirm the customer is satisfied with the response.

checkpoints.name: Closing Signal Recognized
checkpoints.why_missed: No closing signals were observed in the conversation
checkpoints.description: Identifying when customer is ready for next steps
checkpoints.how_to_achieve: Listen for phrases indicating interest like questions about next steps or specific details about purchasing.

checkpoints.name: Commitment Achieved
checkpoints.why_missed: Conversation didn't progress to this stage
checkpoints.description: Securing customer agreement to move forward
checkpoints.how_to_achieve: After addressing all questions, suggest a specific next action like scheduling a viewing or discussing payment options in more detail.

top_strengths: Strong product knowledge with accurate information about apartment specifications and pricing
Clear explanation of delivery timeline and finishing status
Maintained professional tone throughout the conversation

turn_feedback.text: السلام عليكم معك علي عبدالله من شركة حسن علام للتسوية العقاري
turn_feedback.speaker: salesperson
turn_feedback.what_was_good: You started with a proper greeting which is professional
turn_feedback.what_to_improve: There's a spelling mistake in your company name - 'للتسوية' instead of 'للتسويق'
turn_feedback.suggested_alternative: السلام عليكم معك علي عبدالله من شركة حسن علام للتسويق العقاري. كيف يمكنني مساعدتك اليوم؟

turn_feedback.text: لا للتسوية العقاري انا بسوى الاشراء بتاعة المستثمر حسن علام وحضرتك مكانك فين يا أستاذ أحمد
turn_feedback.speaker: salesperson
turn_feedback.what_was_good: You addressed the customer by name which is good for personalization
turn_feedback.what_to_improve: You didn't correct the company name mistake and gave a confusing explanation. You also changed the subject without explaining why location is relevant
turn_feedback.suggested_alternative: عفواً، أقصد للتسويق العقاري. أنا أعمل مع شركة حسن علام للتسويق العقاري. ممكن أسأل حضرتك عن مكان سكنك الحالي لأساعدك في اختيار أفضل موقع يناسبك؟

turn_feedback.text: أنا في مدينة نصر. بس أنا عايز أعرف إيه الشقق اللي عندكم وأسعارها كام وإيه المساحات؟
turn_feedback.speaker: customer

turn_feedback.text: الشقق في مدينتي تبدأ من أول 150 متر وأسعارها تبدأ من أول 2 مليون
turn_feedback.speaker: salesperson
turn_feedback.what_was_good: You provided clear and specific information about apartment sizes and prices
turn_feedback.what_to_improve: You could add more context about why Madinaty is a good choice and ask follow-up questions about the customer's preferences
turn_feedback.suggested_alternative: الشقق في مدينتي تبدأ من أول 150 متر وأسعارها تبدأ من أول 2 مليون. مدينتي منطقة متميزة بالخدمات والمساحات الخضراء. هل هذه المساحة والسعر مناسبين لاحتياجاتك؟

turn_feedback.text: طيب وإيه نظام التسليم؟ والتشطيب؟ وهل فيه أنظمة تقسيط؟
turn_feedback.speaker: customer

turn_feedback.text: التسليم بيكون كمان سنتين وهو بيكون في المرحلة التالتة في المراحل المدينتي وباسملك الشقة متشطبة بالكامل
turn_feedback.speaker: salesperson
turn_feedback.what_was_good: You provided clear information about delivery timeline and finishing status
turn_feedback.what_to_improve: You didn't address the customer's question about payment plans/installments
turn_feedback.suggested_alternative: التسليم بيكون كمان سنتين وهو بيكون في المرحلة التالتة في مراحل مدينتي والشقة متشطبة بالكامل. وبالنسبة لأنظمة التقسيط، عندنا خطط دفع مرنة تبدأ بمقدم 20% والباقي على 5 سنوات. هل تفضل نظام تقسيط معين؟

top_improvements: Build better rapport by correcting misunderstandings and showing personal interest in the customer
Practice active listening by directly addressing customer questions before moving to new topics
Recognize and respond to emotional cues when customers show frustration or impatience
report.executive_summary: You demonstrated good product knowledge about Madinaty apartments, providing accurate information on sizes, prices, and delivery timelines. However, there are opportunities to improve rapport building, active listening, and emotional intelligence to better connect with customers and address their specific needs.
recommended_practice: Practice introducing yourself clearly and correctly, including proper company name pronunciation and spelling
Work on active listening techniques - always address customer questions directly before asking your own
Practice recognizing emotional cues and responding with empathy when customers show frustration
Develop a structured approach to needs discovery that covers location, budget, family size, and timeline
Practice connecting property features to customer benefits rather than just stating facts
